title: About LiftersTouch
mission: To uplift communities by providing sustainable resources and empowering individuals through education, mentorship, and direct support.
vision: A world where every community has the tools to thrive and every individual has the opportunity to reach their full potential.

values.name: Integrity
values.description: We act with honesty and transparency in everything we do.

values.name: Empowerment
values.description: We believe in giving people the tools to help themselves.

values.name: Community
values.description: We are stronger when we work together.

history: Started in 2015 as a small community group, LiftersTouch has grown into a multi-city organization impacting thousands of lives annually.
